raw:

{
  "primary_series": "PNGASEUUSDM",
  "rationale": "PNGASEUUSDM is the IMF/World Bank European natural gas price (Dutch TTF proxy) in USD per MMBtu, monthly. It is the cleanest long-history FRED series for European gas prices. TTF spot itself is not on FRED; Henry Hub (DHHNGSP) would miss the European/Asian LNG dynamic this Node centers on.",

  "lookback_years": 40,

}

parsed.rationale: PNGASEUUSDM is the IMF/World Bank European natural gas price (Dutch TTF proxy) in USD per MMBtu, monthly. It is the cleanest long-history FRED series for European gas prices. TTF spot itself is not on FRED; Henry Hub (DHHNGSP) would miss the European/Asian LNG dynamic this Node centers on.
